summary: Completed testing of 2 new features: Member Role Assignment UI and Debian Deployment Scripts. All backend tests passed (15/15). Frontend UI tests passed - Members tab shows @everyone badge, Add Role button works, role assignment/removal via popover works correctly.
passed_tests: Backend: POST /api/servers/{id}/members/{userId}/roles/{roleId} assigns role correctly
Backend: DELETE /api/servers/{id}/members/{userId}/roles/{roleId} removes role correctly
Backend: Server has @everyone role by default
Backend: Custom role creation works
Backend: Role assignment persists in database (verified via GET)
Backend: Role removal persists in database (verified via GET)
Backend: Non-owner/invalid server returns 403/404
Deploy: install.sh exists at /app/deploy/install.sh
Deploy: install.sh is executable (0755 permissions)
Deploy: install.sh has bash shebang
Deploy: install.sh uses set -euo pipefail (strict mode)
Deploy: install.sh has MongoDB section
Deploy: install.sh has Node.js section
Deploy: install.sh has Python venv section
Deploy: install.sh has nginx section
Deploy: install.sh has systemd section
Deploy: install.sh has TLS/Let's Encrypt section
Deploy: uninstall.sh exists and is executable
Deploy: README.md exists with configuration instructions
Frontend: Members tab shows @everyone badge on members
Frontend: + Add Role button appears for assigning roles
Frontend: Role popover opens with available custom roles
Frontend: Role assignment via popover works
Frontend: Role badge appears after assignment
Frontend: Role removal via X button works
seed_data_creation: Created test roles (TEST_CustomRole, UITestRole, TestRole3, Moderator) during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Member Role Assignment feature is fully functional. Backend endpoints POST/DELETE /servers/{id}/members/{userId}/roles/{roleId} work correctly. Frontend ServerSettings.js Members tab shows @everyone badge, + Add Role button with popover for role selection, and X button on role badges for removal. Deployment scripts at /app/deploy/ are complete with install.sh (264 lines), uninstall.sh (32 lines), and README.md (129 lines). Scripts cannot be executed in this container (no systemd) but structure and content verified.

member_role_assignment.1_members_tab_everyone_badge: PASS - @everyone badge shown on all members
member_role_assignment.2_add_role_button: PASS - + Add Role button visible for each member
member_role_assignment.3_role_popover: PASS - Popover opens with available custom roles
member_role_assignment.4_assign_role: PASS - Clicking role in popover assigns it to member
member_role_assignment.5_role_badge_display: PASS - Assigned role shows as colored badge
member_role_assignment.6_remove_role: PASS - X button on badge removes role

deployment_scripts.3_install_script_structure: PASS - Has all required sections (MongoDB, Node.js, Python, nginx, systemd, TLS)
